name: Breast Pump
description: Client is currently pregnant and due in mid 2026. She'd appreciate a breast pump to aid with nursing baby and also to prepare for heading back to work, it'd be easier with a breast pump. Client will be expecting her 4th child this year.

name: Double stroller
description: This is a family consisting of mother(F/26), father (M/30) and their 2 young children (F/5, M/9mo). Mother is also expecting another child (currently 4 months pregnant). The parents are currently unemployed with father taking ad-hoc jobs. They hope to receive a double stroller so that it will be easier to manage bringing their 2 young children out. Delivery costs to be borne by donor please as family is unable to pay for delivery.

name: Double stroller

The family needs a double stroller to bring the children to childcare centre. Without the stroller, it is very challenging for the client to manage sending them to childcare. Your donation of a double stroller is extremely appreciated.

name: single mattress
description:
The client is experiencing significant caregiving stress in managing her 16-year-old son alongside her 21-year-old son with special needs. The family is also facing financial constraints, as the client’s husband is the sole breadwinner with a limited income. 

Recently, the client’s 21-year-old son urinated on the mattress. The provision of super single mattress would greatly support the family by restoring a basic level of comfort and functionality in their home.
